description_long: This grave yard scene features a snow-covered plot with a prominent brown tombstone or grave marker set on a raised base. To the left of the tombstone stands a stylized evergreen tree with tiered, polygonal foliage, evoking a wintery atmosphere. On the opposite side, a black streetlamp with a glowing yellow light adds an urban touch and suggests nighttime or evening ambiance. Scattered on the snow are small objects, possibly flowers or offerings, adding detail and a sense of recent visitation. The ground is bordered by a low, brown frame, containing the snow and demarcating the grave area. The overall composition is simple yet evocative, blending natural and urban elements in a compact, visually distinct grave yard setting.
description: A snow-covered grave yard scene with a brown tombstone, a stylized evergreen tree, and a black streetlamp, all bordered by a low frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tombstone, evergreen tree on the left, streetlamp on the right, and small objects scattered on the snow.
description_view_1: Side view with the tombstone centered, the tree behind, and the streetlamp to the right, highlighting the depth of the scene.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the back of the tombstone, the tree on the right, and the streetlamp on the left.
description_view_3: Back view with the tombstone's rear face, the tree on the right, and the streetlamp on the left, with the snow and small objects visible.
